goals: Decouple the CLI from `PARALLAX_REPO_ROOT` for script resolution.
Make the compiled binary fully self-contained: `dist/parallax-<platform>` + `dist/runtime/`.

userStories.title: Move examples/ into packages/parallax_cli/runtime/
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the pipeline Python scripts to live inside the CLI package at `packages/parallax_cli/runtime/` so that they are logically owned by the CLI and can be bundled with the CLI build artifact.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Directory `packages/parallax_cli/runtime/` is created with the same subdirectory structure
All Python script files from `examples/` are moved (not copied) to their equivalent paths
The original `examples/` directory is removed (or left empty) from the repo root.
Typecheck / lint passes.

userStories.title: parallax install copies runtime/ to ~/.config/parallax/runtime/
userStories.description: As a CLI user, I want `parallax install` to copy the bundled `runtime/` directory to `~/.config/parallax/runtime/` so that pipeline scripts are available after installation without requiring the source repository.
